title: Zenless Craft Zero
description: A mod for Minecraft inspired by the game Zenless Zone Zero.
body:
This mod is inspired by the game Zenless Zone Zero from Hoyoverse.

This mod is not finished.

In this mod you will find: (for the moment)

Entitys:

_Bangoos (can be tamed with data carrot) (only have Eous skin)

_Jane Doe

_Ellen Joe

_Seth Lowell

_Soldier 11

_Alexendrina

_Nekomata

_Lycaon

_Qingyi

Weapons:

_Jane Daggers

_Ellen Spear

_Seth stick and shield (you can combine stick and shield in a crafting table to obtain is big sword)

_Soldier 11 Sword

_Qingyi Stick

A pull system as been added (go check in keybinds option to configure you keybinds) this is a system to get the weapon by using master tape like in the game.(weapon are really rare)
To get master tape you need polychrome that you can craft with monochrome and colorants when you have your polychromes you can convert them in the convert menu (64 polychromes=1 master tape) (monochrome can be optain by mining them or with adchivment)


I'm new in modding so if you want to help me with textures, 3D moddels, bug report or think you want to see in the mod contact me on discord(phantom__shareur) if you help me ill credit you in the mod if you want.
